channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: A young farmer has explained how one thing is impacted by another as a result of rising oil prices caused by the recent conflict in the Middle East. #Farming #YoungFarmers #UK #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #Oil #BBCNews
item.description: A young farmer has explained how one thing is impacted by another as a result of rising oil prices caused by the recent conflict in the Middle East. #Farming #YoungFarmers #UK #Iran #US #Israel #MiddleEast #Oil #BBCNews

item.title: BTS have kicked off their world tour in Goyang, South Korea, after a four-year hiatus. #BTS #KPop #SouthKorea #BBCNews
item.description: BTS have kicked off their world tour in Goyang, South Korea, after a four-year hiatus. #BTS #KPop #SouthKorea #BBCNews

item.title: It is thought at least 1.6 million people in the UK have tried weight-loss drugs in the past year, and that number is expected to rise. #WeightLoss #Health #Nutrition #BBCNews
item.description: It is thought at least 1.6 million people in the UK have tried weight-loss drugs in the past year, and that number is expected to rise. #WeightLoss #Health #Nutrition #BBCNews

item.title: The four Artemis astronauts have been living in the spacecraft for the past nine days, and are now preparing to return to Earth on 10 April. #Artemis #Orion #Nasa #Space #BBCNews
item.description: The four Artemis astronauts have been living in the spacecraft for the past nine days, and are now preparing to return to Earth on 10 April. #Artemis #Orion #Nasa #Space #BBCNews

item.title: The Artemis II crew's return to Earth in the Orion spacecraft will be a fiery plunge through the Earth's atmosphere, before a parachute splashdown in the Pacific Ocean. #ArtemisII #Nasa #Space #Moon #BBCNews
item.description: The Artemis II crew's return to Earth in the Orion spacecraft will be a fiery plunge through the Earth's atmosphere, before a parachute splashdown in the Pacific Ocean. #ArtemisII #Nasa #Space #Moon #BBCNews

item.title: Lee Milne was found guilty by a jury of culpable homicide. The case was the first prosecution of its kind in Scotland, in that Milne was responsible even though his wife jumped to her death. #Scotland #UKNews #BreakingNews #BBCNews
item.description: Lee Milne was found guilty by a jury of culpable homicide. The case was the first prosecution of its kind in Scotland, in that Milne was responsible even though his wife jumped to her death. #Scotland #UKNews #BreakingNews #BBCNews

item.title: Lava fountains reached heights of 625ft (190m) in the 44th eruption of Kilauea since December 2024. #Hawaii #Kilauea #Volcano #Geological #BBCNews
item.description: Lava fountains reached heights of 625ft (190m) in the 44th eruption of Kilauea since December 2024. #Hawaii #Kilauea #Volcano #Geological #BBCNews

item.title: The UK prime minister was speaking in Bahrain after a Middle East trip that included visits to Saudi Arabia, UAE and Qatar. #KeirStarmer #UKPolitics #MiddleEast #Iran #Diplomacy #BBCNews
item.description: The UK prime minister was speaking in Bahrain after a Middle East trip that included visits to Saudi Arabia, UAE and Qatar. #KeirStarmer #UKPolitics #MiddleEast #Iran #Diplomacy #BBCNews

item.title: Have you experienced long queues at the airport because of the new system? #Europe #Airport #TravelTok #News #BBCNews
item.description: Have you experienced long queues at the airport because of the new system? #Europe #Airport #TravelTok #News #BBCNews

item.title: Bodycam footage showed the moment Carlo Tritta, who repeatedly messaged a teenager and encouraged her to send him sexually explicit images of herself, was arrested by police while at work. Tritta was jailed for 28 months. #Police #Roblox #Hampshire #BBCN
item.description: Bodycam footage showed the moment Carlo Tritta, who repeatedly messaged a teenager and encouraged her to send him sexually explicit images of herself, was arrested by police while at work. Tritta was jailed for 28 months. #Police #Roblox #Hampshire #BBCN

item.title: Travel across parts of the Republic of Ireland has been affected for the fourth day in a row on Friday as vehicles, including tractors, block roads. #RepublicOfIreland #Fuel #Protests #Farmers #BBCNews
item.description: Travel across parts of the Republic of Ireland has been affected for the fourth day in a row on Friday as vehicles, including tractors, block roads. #RepublicOfIreland #Fuel #Protests #Farmers #BBCNews

item.title: There will be a very close eye on the weather as the Artemis crew splash down to Earth. #Artemis #ArtemisII #Nasa #News #BBCNews
item.description: There will be a very close eye on the weather as the Artemis crew splash down to Earth. #Artemis #ArtemisII #Nasa #News #BBCNews

item.title: Two men and two women, whose identities have not yet been released, died when they tried to board a water taxi near Calais, France. #UK #France #BreakingNews #BBCNews
item.description: Two men and two women, whose identities have not yet been released, died when they tried to board a water taxi near Calais, France. #UK #France #BreakingNews #BBCNews

item.title: The vehicle fell from a height of 10m near San Sebastián de La Gomera, according to Spanish media. #CanaryIslands #Bus #BreakingNews #BBCNews
item.description: The vehicle fell from a height of 10m near San Sebastián de La Gomera, according to Spanish media. #CanaryIslands #Bus #BreakingNews #BBCNews

item.title: Have you got a bird feeder in your garden? #Bird #BirdFeeder #Garden #Summer #BBCNews
item.description: Have you got a bird feeder in your garden? #Bird #BirdFeeder #Garden #Summer #BBCNews

item.title: That Toberlone is going to hit different after 10 days eating space food. #Artemis #Nasa #Space #News #BBCNews
item.description: That Toberlone is going to hit different after 10 days eating space food. #Artemis #Nasa #Space #News #BBCNews

item.title: No Title
item.description: No Description

item.title: There were 28 people on board the bus, including 27 British tourists and one driver, emergency services in the Canary Islands said. #Bus #CanaryIslands #LaGomera #BBCNews
item.description: There were 28 people on board the bus, including 27 British tourists and one driver, emergency services in the Canary Islands said. #Bus #CanaryIslands #LaGomera #BBCNews

item.title: Up to 3,636 people have been killed in the war - among them, at least 254 children - according to the US-based Human Rights Activists News Agency, which collates data from Iran. #Iran #US #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: Up to 3,636 people have been killed in the war - among them, at least 254 children - according to the US-based Human Rights Activists News Agency, which collates data from Iran. #Iran #US #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Manon Bannerman announced she was stepping back from the group in February, saying she was "healthy" and "taking care of myself". #Katseye #Manon #Coachella #PopStarAcademy #BBCNews
item.description: Manon Bannerman announced she was stepping back from the group in February, saying she was "healthy" and "taking care of myself". #Katseye #Manon #Coachella #PopStarAcademy #BBCNews

item.title: At least 357 people have died since Israel’s strikes on Beirut on Wednesday, as search and rescue operations continue. #Lebanon #Israel #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: At least 357 people have died since Israel’s strikes on Beirut on Wednesday, as search and rescue operations continue. #Lebanon #Israel #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Replying to @crazycat On Thursday, First Lady Melania Trump denied connections to Jeffrey Epstein, telling reporters at the White House that any claims linking the two "need to end today". #MelaniaTrump #DonaldTrump #JeffreyEpstein #GhislaineMaxwell #BBCN
item.description: Replying to @crazycat On Thursday, First Lady Melania Trump denied connections to Jeffrey Epstein, telling reporters at the White House that any claims linking the two "need to end today". #MelaniaTrump #DonaldTrump #JeffreyEpstein #GhislaineMaxwell #BBCN

item.title: The Artemis II mission crew's Orion capsule has separated from the service module. The service module's engines performed the burns to send Orion looping around the moon, while its solar arrays generated the power that kept the crew alive. #ArtemisII #Nas
item.description: The Artemis II mission crew's Orion capsule has separated from the service module. The service module's engines performed the burns to send Orion looping around the moon, while its solar arrays generated the power that kept the crew alive. #ArtemisII #Nas

item.title: Splashdown confirmed. The Artemis II mission’s Orion capsule has safely landed in the Pacific Ocean off San Diego. #ArtemisII #Nasa #Space #Moon #BBCNews
item.description: Splashdown confirmed. The Artemis II mission’s Orion capsule has safely landed in the Pacific Ocean off San Diego. #ArtemisII #Nasa #Space #Moon #BBCNews

item.title: All four Artemis II crew members have exited the Orion module, after a safe splashdown in the Pacific Ocean off San Diego. #ArtemisII #Nasa #Space #Moon #BBCNews
item.description: All four Artemis II crew members have exited the Orion module, after a safe splashdown in the Pacific Ocean off San Diego. #ArtemisII #Nasa #Space #Moon #BBCNews

item.title: Iran's delegation leader Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf says his negotiators have "good intentions" but "do not trust" the US. Vance previously warned the Americans won't be receptive if Iran "try to play us". #Iran #US #Israel #Pakistan #BBCNews
item.description: Iran's delegation leader Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf says his negotiators have "good intentions" but "do not trust" the US. Vance previously warned the Americans won't be receptive if Iran "try to play us". #Iran #US #Israel #Pakistan #BBCNews

item.title: Sunset times are stretching later every evening. #Sunset #DaylightSavings #UKWeather #Forecast #BBCNews
item.description: Sunset times are stretching later every evening. #Sunset #DaylightSavings #UKWeather #Forecast #BBCNews

item.title: he peace talks in Islamabad are an offshoot of a two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran that was brokered by Pakistan. #Pakistan #Iran #US #Israel #Islamabad #BBCNews
item.description: he peace talks in Islamabad are an offshoot of a two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran that was brokered by Pakistan. #Pakistan #Iran #US #Israel #Islamabad #BBCNews

item.title: All four have vocally supported Donald Trump in the past – but the president wrote that their views are now the opposite of his "Make America Great Again" movement. #DonaldTrump #TuckerCarlson #Podcasts #CandaceOwens #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: All four have vocally supported Donald Trump in the past – but the president wrote that their views are now the opposite of his "Make America Great Again" movement. #DonaldTrump #TuckerCarlson #Podcasts #CandaceOwens #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: An Garda Síochána (Irish police service), has declared an "exceptional event" in response to the fuel protests, allowing it to double the number of officers available to work. #Ireland #CarTok #Petrol #Iran #US #BBCNews
item.description: An Garda Síochána (Irish police service), has declared an "exceptional event" in response to the fuel protests, allowing it to double the number of officers available to work. #Ireland #CarTok #Petrol #Iran #US #BBCNews
